name: Barbecue Sauce for Hot Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. If the baby food is not available, use finely chopped peaches (canned and drained).
2. Combine all ingredients thoroughly.
3. Core the hot dogs diagonally on three sides.
4. Baste the hot dogs with the sauce about three times while cooking.
5. The sauce can also be used on pork or chicken, or heated in a chafing dish with sliced hot dogs.
6. Makes about 1.5 cups of sauce (enough for 2 lbs of hot dogs).
